--- title: "Organic molecules" --- # Hydrocarbon ## Alkane [![Methane is used in the manufacture of acrylic resins and polyester fibers and in the pharmaceutical industry.](metano){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C)

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/metano)

::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} wireframe only; wireframe 0.2 ``` ::: [![Ethane is used as a biofuel, a source of electrical energy, or as a raw material to generate byproducts.](etano){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CC) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} rotate x 10 ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/etano)

[![Propane is present in some fuels used in automobiles, such as gasoline and alcohol.](propano.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CCC) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} spin on ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Propane)

[![Butane is used as a fuel for lighters and as a raw material in the production of synthetic rubber.](butano.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CCCC) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} isosurface vdw ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Butane)

[![Hexadecane is a high-purity compound widely used in various laboratory and pharmaceutical applications. industrial.](hexadecano.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CCCCCCCCCCCCCCC) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} moveto 2.0 {1 1 1 90} ``` :::

[Wikipedia](: https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alcano)

## Alkene [![Ethylene is produced during the ripening of fruits, accelerating this process in other fruits that are in contact with ripe fruits.](etileno.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C=C) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} select atomno=1,2 color atoms yellow ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ethylene)

[![Propylene is used as a fixative in perfumes, a vehicle for some ingredients in topical medications, and also a moisturizing humectant in various cosmetics.](propileno.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CC=C) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bondOrder double ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Propylene)

[![Pentene is a molecule used as a solvent, fuel additive, and in the production of polymers.](penteno.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CCCC=C) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} color bonds red ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://en.wikibooks.org/wiki/Introduction_to_Chemistry/Hydrocarbons)

[![Benzene is used in the production of lubricants, rubbers, dyes, solvents, and pesticides.](benzeno.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C1=CC=CC=C1) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} for (var i=0; i<10; i++) { rotate y 30 color atoms random delay 0.5 } ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/benzene)

[![Hexene is very commonly used in the chemical and petrochemical industries and gas stations.](hexeno.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CCCCC=C) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} color bonds blue ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/hexene)

| Links: 1. [Alkanes and alkenes](https://www.echalk.co.uk/3Dmolecules/alkanes_alkenes/alkanes.htm) ## Alkyne [![Acetylene is used in the manufacture of explosives, solvents and plastics.](acetileno.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model= acetylene) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} color bonds yellow ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Acetylene)

[![Propylene is used in welding.](propino.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CC#C) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} select bond(triple);C2, C3 ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/propino)

[![2-butyne the main use is the synthesis of butadiene for artificial rubber.](2-butino.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CC#CC) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} load "SMILES:CCCC#C" ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ethylacethylene)

# Arene # Alcohol [![Ethanol is used as a biofuel, a source of electrical energy or as a raw material to generate by-products.](etanol.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CCO) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} cylinder 50 ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ethanol)

[![Ethylene glycol is a chemical compound widely used in the composition of antifreezes.](etilenoglicol.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C(CO)O) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} spacefill 20 ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/etilenoglicol)

# Phenol [![Phenol has applications such as; precursor or reagent in the production of resins, plastics, medicines, herbicides and disinfectants.](fenol.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C1=CC=C(C=C1)O) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} select aromatic color blue ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/fenol)

[![Resveratrol is used to reduce levels of LDL.](resveratrol.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C1=CC(=CC=C1/C=C/C2=CC(=CC(=C2)O)O)O) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} select aromatic wireframe 100 ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/resveratrol)

# Ether [![Ethyl ether is used as a solvent for resins and oils, as well as in the preparation of gunpowder and artificial silk.](eter etilico.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CCOCC) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} select O C wireframe 100 ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/%C3%89ter_et%C3%ADlico)

# Aldehyde [![Acetaldehyde is an intermediate in the manufacture of other substances, such as acetic acid.](acetaldeido.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CC=O) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} select C=O wireframe 100 ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Acetaldehyde)

[![Formaldehyde is used in industry, it can be used to manufacture disinfectants.](formaldeido.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C=O) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} wireframe 50 ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Methanal)

# Ketone [![Acetone is used as a solvent and intermediate in the manufacture of other chemical substances.](acetona.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=CC(=O)C) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} isosurface solvent; color isosurface red blue ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Acetone)

[![Cyclopentanone is a colorless liquid organic compound with an odor similar to the smell of peppermint.](ciclopentanona.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model= C1CCC(=O)C1) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} select carbonyl color yellow ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cyclopentanone)

# Carboxylic acid [![Acetylsalicylic acid is used as a medication to treat pain (analgesic), fever (antipyretic) and inflammation (anti-inflammatory). ](ac.acetilsalicilico.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model= CC(=O)OC1=CC=CC=C1C(=O)O) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} dihedral ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/%C3%81cido_acetilsalic%C3%ADlico)

[![Ascorbic acid increases the gastrointestinal absorption of iron; and acts as a urine acidifier.](acido ascorbico.png){width=40%}](https://chemapps.stolaf.edu/jmol/jmol.php?model=C([C@@H]([C@@H]1C(=C(C(=O)O1)O)O)O)O) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} show atoms show bonds ``` :::

[Wikipedia](https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/%C3%81cido_asc%C3%B3rbico)
